text.title: Spatial Accessibility Procedure
text.summary: 5-step audit procedure to produce a spatial-accessibility report for store-submission readiness.

step.name: enumerate-interactions
step.input: XR design doc, interaction state machines.
step.action: List every interaction with name + primary modality + state machine reference.

step.name: map-modalities
step.action: For each interaction, assign ≥2 independent modalities and a non-spatial fallback. Run `templates/alt-input-matrix.ts` to detect gaps.
step.output: Modality matrix complete; gaps file empty.
step.decision-gate: If any interaction has <2 modalities, return to design — do not ship.

step.name: comfort-and-captions
step.action: Verify locomotion includes both vignette and teleport; turning supports both snap and smooth. Confirm head-locked captions default + world-locked option + audio descriptions for visually-encoded meaning.

step.name: seated-mode-check
step.action: For each interaction, confirm seated parity. Where standing-only is unavoidable, document the accommodation (e.g., remote-trigger via companion app).

step.name: assistive-user-testing
step.action: Recruit ≥1 low-vision, ≥1 motor-impaired, ≥1 motion-sensitive user. Run hardware sessions. Log findings; file blockers. Re-run procedure until log is clean.
step.output: `tester_mix` populated with non-zero counts in each category; report validates.
step.decision-gate: If any tester category = 0, no compliance claim — downgrade to "partial conformance".
